titleZh: 美国游客 · 上海入境清单

items.titleZh: 确认护照有效期超过入境日期 6 个月以上
items.titleEn: Check passport has at least 6 months validity beyond entry date
items.detailZh: 少于 6 个月有效期的护照可能在边检被拒绝入境。
items.detailEn: Passports with under 6 months of remaining validity may be denied boarding or entry.

items.titleZh: 准备好回程 / 离境机票（飞机、火车或汽车）
items.titleEn: Have proof of onward/return ticket (flight, train or bus out of China)
items.detailZh: 可打印或保存在手机，离境时可能需要出示。
items.detailEn: Keep a printed or mobile copy — you may be asked to present it on departure.

items.titleZh: 保存酒店中文地址 — 可给出租车司机看
items.titleEn: Save hotel address in Chinese characters — show it to taxi drivers
items.detailZh: 建议截图保存，避免在手机无信号时无法出示。
items.detailEn: Screenshot it — taxi drivers rarely read English, and you may be offline at the airport exit.

items.titleZh: 购买涵盖医疗运送的旅行保险（推荐）
items.titleEn: Buy travel insurance covering medical evacuation (recommended)
items.detailZh: 建议保额不低于 50 万美元，并覆盖紧急医疗运送。
items.detailEn: Recommended coverage: at least USD 500,000 including emergency medical evacuation.

items.titleZh: 出发前下载首次入境城市的离线数据包
items.titleEn: Download the offline pack for your first-arrival city before departure
items.detailZh: 可在 Sightour 应用 我的 → 离线包 中下载。
items.detailEn: Download from Sightour app under You → Offline packs.

items.titleZh: 随身携带少量人民币现金（¥500–¥1000）以备前 24 小时使用
items.titleEn: Carry a small amount of CNY cash (¥500–¥1000) for the first 24h
items.detailZh: 抵达后办理支付 App 期间需要现金。
items.detailEn: Cash is needed for taxis and small vendors while you set up mobile payment apps.

items.titleZh: 在 工具 → 常用短语 中保存至少 10 条应急短语
items.titleEn: Save at least 10 emergency phrases in Tools → Phrase book
items.detailZh: 建议包含「打车」「点餐」「问路」「紧急」等场景。
items.detailEn: Cover scenarios like taxi, dining, asking directions, and emergency.

items.titleZh: 将你所在国家领事馆的紧急联系电话保存到手机主屏幕
items.titleEn: Save your country's consular emergency number to your phone home screen
items.detailZh: 可在 Sightour 应急页面找到 24 小时紧急联系电话。
items.detailEn: Find 24-hour emergency numbers on the Sightour Emergency page.

items.titleZh: 到达后：确认酒店已在 24 小时内将你的住宿信息登记至当地派出所
items.titleEn: On arrival: confirm the hotel has registered your stay with the local police station within 24h
items.detailZh: 由酒店自动办理，前台会扫描你的护照。
items.detailEn: Hotels handle this automatically — the front desk will scan your passport on check-in.

titleZh: 美国商务访客 · 上海入境清单
titleEn: U.S. business visitor · Shanghai arrival checklist

items.titleZh: 确认护照有效期超过入境日期 6 个月以上
items.titleEn: Check passport has at least 6 months validity beyond entry date
items.detailZh: 少于 6 个月有效期的护照可能在边检被拒绝入境。
items.detailEn: Passports with under 6 months of remaining validity may be denied boarding or entry.

items.titleZh: 准备好回程 / 离境机票（飞机、火车或汽车）
items.titleEn: Have proof of onward/return ticket (flight, train or bus out of China)
items.detailZh: 可打印或保存在手机，离境时可能需要出示。
items.detailEn: Keep a printed or mobile copy — you may be asked to present it on departure.

items.titleZh: 携带中方合作方出具的邀请函（商务活动证明）
items.titleEn: Bring a business invitation letter from your Chinese partner
items.detailZh: 包含会议名称、日期、地点及邀请方信息。
items.detailEn: Should include the meeting name, date, venue, and inviting party information.

items.titleZh: 保存酒店中文地址 — 可给出租车司机看
items.titleEn: Save hotel address in Chinese characters — show it to taxi drivers
items.detailZh: 建议截图保存，避免在手机无信号时无法出示。
items.detailEn: Screenshot it — taxi drivers rarely read English, and you may be offline at the airport exit.

items.titleZh: 购买涵盖医疗运送的旅行保险（推荐）
items.titleEn: Buy travel insurance covering medical evacuation (recommended)
items.detailZh: 建议保额不低于 50 万美元。
items.detailEn: Recommended coverage: at least USD 500,000.

items.titleZh: 出发前下载首次入境城市的离线数据包
items.titleEn: Download the offline pack for your first-arrival city before departure
items.detailZh: 可在 Sightour 应用 我的 → 离线包 中下载。
items.detailEn: Download from Sightour app under You → Offline packs.

items.titleZh: 随身携带少量人民币现金（¥500–¥1000）以备前 24 小时使用
items.titleEn: Carry a small amount of CNY cash (¥500–¥1000) for the first 24h
items.detailZh: 商务卡可能在小型商户不通用。
items.detailEn: Corporate cards are not always accepted at small vendors.

items.titleZh: 将你所在国家领事馆的紧急联系电话保存到手机主屏幕
items.titleEn: Save your country's consular emergency number to your phone home screen
items.detailZh: 可在 Sightour 应急页面找到 24 小时紧急联系电话。
items.detailEn: Find 24-hour emergency numbers on the Sightour Emergency page.

items.titleZh: 到达后：确认酒店已在 24 小时内将你的住宿信息登记至当地派出所
items.titleEn: On arrival: confirm the hotel has registered your stay with the local police station within 24h
items.detailZh: 由酒店自动办理，前台会扫描你的护照。
items.detailEn: Hotels handle this automatically — the front desk will scan your passport on check-in.

titleZh: 英国游客 · 上海入境清单

items.titleZh: 确认护照有效期超过入境日期 6 个月以上
items.titleEn: Check passport has at least 6 months validity beyond entry date
items.detailZh: 少于 6 个月有效期的护照可能在边检被拒绝入境。
items.detailEn: Passports with under 6 months of remaining validity may be denied boarding or entry.

items.titleZh: 准备好回程 / 离境机票（飞机、火车或汽车）
items.titleEn: Have proof of onward/return ticket (flight, train or bus out of China)
items.detailZh: 可打印或保存在手机。
items.detailEn: Keep a printed or mobile copy.

items.titleZh: 保存酒店中文地址 — 可给出租车司机看
items.titleEn: Save hotel address in Chinese characters — show it to taxi drivers
items.detailZh: 建议截图保存。
items.detailEn: Screenshot it for offline use.

items.titleZh: 购买涵盖医疗运送的旅行保险（推荐）
items.titleEn: Buy travel insurance covering medical evacuation (recommended)
items.detailZh: 建议保额不低于 5 万英镑。
items.detailEn: Recommended coverage: at least GBP 50,000 including medical evacuation.

items.titleZh: 出发前下载首次入境城市的离线数据包
items.titleEn: Download the offline pack for your first-arrival city before departure
items.detailZh: 可在 Sightour 应用 我的 → 离线包 中下载。
items.detailEn: Download from Sightour app under You → Offline packs.

items.titleZh: 随身携带少量人民币现金（¥500–¥1000）以备前 24 小时使用
items.titleEn: Carry a small amount of CNY cash (¥500–¥1000) for the first 24h
items.detailZh: 英国借记卡在 ATM 上通常可取现。
items.detailEn: UK debit cards usually work at major ATMs.

items.titleZh: 在 工具 → 常用短语 中保存至少 10 条应急短语
items.titleEn: Save at least 10 emergency phrases in Tools → Phrase book
items.detailZh: 建议包含「打车」「点餐」「问路」「紧急」等场景。
items.detailEn: Cover scenarios like taxi, dining, asking directions, and emergency.

items.titleZh: 将你所在国家领事馆的紧急联系电话保存到手机主屏幕
items.titleEn: Save your country's consular emergency number to your phone home screen
items.detailZh: 英国领事馆 24 小时全球热线 +44 20 7008 1500。
items.detailEn: FCDO 24/7 global line: +44 20 7008 1500.

items.titleZh: 到达后：确认酒店已在 24 小时内将你的住宿信息登记至当地派出所
items.titleEn: On arrival: confirm the hotel has registered your stay with the local police station within 24h
items.detailZh: 由酒店自动办理，前台会扫描你的护照。
items.detailEn: Hotels handle this automatically — the front desk will scan your passport on check-in.

titleZh: 日本游客 · 上海入境清单

items.titleZh: パスポートの残存有効期間が入国日から 6 ヶ月以上あることを確認
items.titleEn: Check passport has at least 6 months validity beyond entry date
items.detailZh: 6 ヶ月未満の残存期間だと入国拒否される可能性があります。
items.detailEn: Passports with under 6 months of remaining validity may be denied boarding or entry.

items.titleZh: 復路 / 出国チケット（飛行機・列車・バス）を用意
items.titleEn: Have proof of onward/return ticket (flight, train or bus out of China)
items.detailZh: 印刷またはスマホで保存。
items.detailEn: Keep a printed or mobile copy.

items.titleZh: ホテルの住所を中国語で保存 — タクシー運転手に見せるため
items.titleEn: Save hotel address in Chinese characters — show it to taxi drivers
items.detailZh: スクリーンショット推奨。
items.detailEn: Screenshot it for offline use.

items.titleZh: 医療搬送を含む旅行保険に加入（推奨）
items.titleEn: Buy travel insurance covering medical evacuation (recommended)
items.detailZh: 補償額 500 万円以上推奨。
items.detailEn: Recommended coverage: at least JPY 5,000,000.

items.titleZh: 出発前に初入国都市のオフラインパックをダウンロード
items.titleEn: Download the offline pack for your first-arrival city before departure
items.detailZh: Sightour アプリの「マイ → オフラインパック」からダウンロード可能。
items.detailEn: Download from Sightour app under You → Offline packs.

items.titleZh: 最初の 24 時間用に少額の人民元現金（500〜1000 元）を携帯
items.titleEn: Carry a small amount of CNY cash (¥500–¥1000) for the first 24h
items.detailZh: モバイル決済アプリのセットアップ中に必要。
items.detailEn: Cash is needed for taxis and small vendors while you set up mobile payment apps.

items.titleZh: ツール → よく使うフレーズ に 10 件以上保存
items.titleEn: Save at least 10 emergency phrases in Tools → Phrase book
items.detailZh: タクシー・食事・道案内・緊急時など。
items.detailEn: Cover scenarios like taxi, dining, asking directions, and emergency.

items.titleZh: 自国領事館の緊急連絡先をスマホのホーム画面に保存
items.titleEn: Save your country's consular emergency number to your phone home screen
items.detailZh: 在 Shanghai 日本国総領事館 代表 021-5257-4766。
items.detailEn: Consulate General of Japan in Shanghai: 021-5257-4766.

items.titleZh: 到着後、ホテルが 24 時間以内にあなたの宿泊情報を当地派出所に登録したことを確認
items.titleEn: On arrival: confirm the hotel has registered your stay with the local police station within 24h
items.detailZh: ホテルが自動で処理。
items.detailEn: Hotels handle this automatically — the front desk will scan your passport on check-in.

titleZh: 日本商务访客 · 上海入境清单
titleEn: Japanese business visitor · Shanghai arrival checklist

items.titleZh: パスポートの残存有効期間が入国日から 6 ヶ月以上あることを確認
items.titleEn: Check passport has at least 6 months validity beyond entry date
items.detailZh: 6 ヶ月未満の残存期間だと入国拒否される可能性があります。
items.detailEn: Passports with under 6 months of remaining validity may be denied boarding or entry.

items.titleZh: 復路 / 出国チケット（飛行機・列車・バス）を用意
items.titleEn: Have proof of onward/return ticket (flight, train or bus out of China)
items.detailZh: 印刷またはスマホで保存。
items.detailEn: Keep a printed or mobile copy.

items.titleZh: 中国側パートナーからの招聘状を持参
items.titleEn: Bring a business invitation letter from your Chinese partner
items.detailZh: 会議名・日時・場所・招聘元情報を含む。
items.detailEn: Should include the meeting name, date, venue, and inviting party information.

items.titleZh: ホテルの住所を中国語で保存 — タクシー運転手に見せるため
items.titleEn: Save hotel address in Chinese characters — show it to taxi drivers
items.detailZh: スクリーンショット推奨。
items.detailEn: Screenshot it for offline use.

items.titleZh: 医療搬送を含む旅行保険に加入（推奨）
items.titleEn: Buy travel insurance covering medical evacuation (recommended)
items.detailZh: 補償額 500 万円以上推奨。
items.detailEn: Recommended coverage: at least JPY 5,000,000.

items.titleZh: 出発前に初入国都市のオフラインパックをダウンロード
items.titleEn: Download the offline pack for your first-arrival city before departure
items.detailZh: Sightour アプリの「マイ → オフラインパック」からダウンロード可能。
items.detailEn: Download from Sightour app under You → Offline packs.

items.titleZh: 最初の 24 時間用に少額の人民元現金（500〜1000 元）を携帯
items.titleEn: Carry a small amount of CNY cash (¥500–¥1000) for the first 24h
items.detailZh: 法人カードは小規模店で使えないことがある。
items.detailEn: Corporate cards are not always accepted at small vendors.

items.titleZh: 自国領事館の緊急連絡先をスマホのホーム画面に保存
items.titleEn: Save your country's consular emergency number to your phone home screen
items.detailZh: 在 Shanghai 日本国総領事館 代表 021-5257-4766。
items.detailEn: Consulate General of Japan in Shanghai: 021-5257-4766.

items.titleZh: 到着後、ホテルが 24 時間以内にあなたの宿泊情報を当地派出所に登録したことを確認
items.titleEn: On arrival: confirm the hotel has registered your stay with the local police station within 24h
items.detailZh: ホテルが自動で処理。
items.detailEn: Hotels handle this automatically — the front desk will scan your passport on check-in.
